sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22477" key="gna/falon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνά-φαλον</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνά-φαλλον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνα-φεῖον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνα-φεύς</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνα-φευτικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνα-φεύω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνα-φικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνά-φισσα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνά-φος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γνά-φω</orth>, <sense id="n22477.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κν-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
